query:
SELECT
            (ct.hidden OR c.hidden) AS "hidden!",
            tu.team_role AS "role!: TeamRole"
        FROM crm_contacts ct
        JOIN crm_companies c
            ON c.id = ct.company_id
        JOIN team_user tu
            ON tu.team_id = c.team_id
           AND tu.user_id = $1
        WHERE ct.id = $2
